name: Grits Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 3-1/2 cups milk to boiling in a medium saucepan.
2. Gradually stir in the grits. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thick (about 10 minutes).
3. Remove from heat. Add butter and garlic cheese; stir until melted.
4. Stir in eggs and remaining milk. Pour into a 2-quart casserole.
5. Bake in a preheated 375 degree oven uncovered for 30 minutes.
6. Sprinkle grated cheese over top. Bake 15 minutes longer.
